scripts.db:init: docker exec dockercomposeformongodbandinf-mongodb-1 mongosh --eval "try { rs.initiate(); } catch(e) { print('Already initialized'); } cfg = rs.conf(); cfg.members[0].host = 'localhost:27017'; rs.reconfig(cfg, {force: true}); print('✅ Replica Set Ready!');"
scripts.db:prep: net stop MongoDB && npm run db:init
